title: Upstart (UPST) Earnings Report: Key Numbers & Transcript Summary
text: Upstart Holdings (UPST) Q1 2024 earnings report showed revenue of $128 million, up 24% year-over-year, surpassing analyst expectations of $124.87 million. However, the company reported GAAP net loss of $64.6 million, translating to negative $0.74 EPS, below analyst expectations of negative $0.39. Loan originations totaled $1.1 billion, up 13% from prior year, with conversion rate improving from 8% to 14%. Contribution profit reached $81.1 million, up 20% year-over-year, with contribution margin of 59%. Adjusted EBITDA improved to negative $20.3 million from negative $31.1 million in Q1 2023. The company guided Q2 2024 revenue of approximately $125 million and net loss of approximately $75 million. The earnings report highlighted the company's progress in model improvements and operational efficiency despite continued losses.
